{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603232040472766B6F1EFFB1049CDA5"}"},"total":1},"data_list":[{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7607428582223561497","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"《名学之大理寺神探》以架空陈朝为幕，汇聚神探韬不掉、猛将曹前冲、医痴火序等鲜活群像。长安连环命案中，死者被精准取走器官，暗合五行玄机；沙州石窟壁画藏着千年秘宝，守护家族一夜灭门；南州诡异毒酒让百姓疯癫，竟牵出通敌叛国阴谋。从朝堂冤案到边关诡局，从密室凶案到跨州阴谋，众人各展所长、携手破局，在层层反转的疑云中，揭开隐藏在权谋与侠义背后的惊人真相。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1771245800,"group_id":"7586632801034701848","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"396300481467534"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7586632801034701848","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"351"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":""},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":1707,"read_book_count":0,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":1,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7594725304911332121","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"希望大家可以评分，说说写的如何？"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1768286845,"group_id":"7586632801034701848","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"写好属于自己的故事，加油","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nw03z+Z9cH1whDl814qtmzM=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/db665c42c351444ba90f53c123c90443~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776788580&x-signature=WOasL%2Bzjyl55cypu8cWoNKKyKIo%3D","user_id":"396300481467534","user_name":"天晶兽"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"396300481467534","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author_level_1","intro":"{"title_name":"作家Lv.1","title_id":"author_level_1"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家Lv.1","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家Lv.1"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7586632801034701848","book_info":{"abstract":"【名侦探学院同人文】
【架空历史】
陈朝，这是一个架空王朝，其政治体制和中国唐朝类似，领土面积也与唐朝类似，周围少数民族：北方以漠北狼族和契丹族为主；东北以女真通古斯汗国为主；
西南以南诏国为主；西北以西凉汗国为主。
陈朝国都：长安
陈朝陪都：洛阳
陈朝经济中心：南州
陈朝北方重镇：幽州
陈朝军事体制：长安坐镇京都三军（金吾卫、麒麟军、御林军）
（其中，麒麟军守备长安、洛阳、潼关三地，兵力约十五万；金吾卫守备长安城，兵力三千；御林军守备长安皇城，兵力一百五十人）
陈朝开国皇帝：陈高祖陈源（45年，年号大通）
陈朝二代天子：陈太宗陈焱（本故事主要发生时代）
陈朝皇宫：玄武宫（主要办公地），朱雀台（皇后生活地点），东宫（太子居住地），白虎殿（陈朝功臣殿），青龙宫（陈朝皇帝避暑地）","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/7b832f79cf4efb8519468e3642586c48~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"天晶兽","author_id":"","book_id":"7586632801034701848","book_name":"名学之大理寺神探","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#d8c0a0","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":751,"name":"悬疑灵异","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=751&name=悬疑灵异&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":10,"name":"悬疑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=10&name=悬疑&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":16,"name":"武侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=16&name=武侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":61,"name":"推理","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=61&name=推理&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7586632959034147352","read_count":"56","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"138070"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"75","tags":"悬疑灵异,悬疑,推理,武侠,同人","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/7b832f79cf4efb8519468e3642586c48~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779453647&x-signature=gTJ%2FtMwMfFVpxesaGGb3ZgtYovk%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"396300481467534","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"163"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603232040472766B6F1EFFB1049CDA5"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":""},"stat":{"digg_count":1,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":722,"read_book_count":0,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":63},"user_action":{"author":1,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4}],"extra":{"book_info":{"abstract":"","audio_thumb_uri":"","author":"","author_id":"","book_id":"7586632801034701848","book_name":"","book_type":"","color_dominate":"","creation_status":"","genre":"","genre_type":"","score":"","serial_count":"","tags":"","thumb_url":"","tomato_book_status":""},"filter_tag":[],"hot_word_search":[],"score_cnt":4,"score_text":"4人点评"}},"debug_info":"","log_id":"202603232040472766B6F1EFFB1049CDA5","message":"请求成功"}
